text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I escort Symboli Rudolf to the infirmary after she
suffers an injury during training.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is nothing, Trainer—hardly more than a
bruise. It will heal in no time.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I were to falter at a scratch like this, I would be
ashamed to call myself Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Why, I could resume training tomorrow if you
wanted. Haha...
choice_data_list: I was hoping you'd say that!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I had hoped a little humor would reassure
you, but it seems to have had the opposite effect.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. I see now that putting up a brave
front is not always the best answer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf makes to get up, only to freeze
mid-motion.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...It seems I was a little hasty in my assessment. I
may need time to recuperate after all.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: So much for sparing my dignity...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Then we are of one mind. No hardship is too
onerous for the Emperor.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm always vigilant for opportunities to put my
ideals into practice.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This is one such time. I will not be undone by a
minor mishap!
